_comment: Reference-design fixture for the from-design crossref flow. Unlike a bare-BOM fixture, this carries the TOPOLOGY + operating SPEC, so the pipeline derives each ref_des's real operating-point stress and gates substitutes against the CIRCUIT's currents/voltages — the FAE-parity path for parts whose MPN the BOM omits. L1 here is deliberately an unlabelled (null-MPN) inductor: an FAE would size it from the buck's peak inductor current (~3.45 A), and so must the tool.
title: Buck 24V->5V @ 3A reference design (operating-point stress)

L1.note: L1 is a null-MPN inductor. Any substitute whose Isat is below the ~3.45 A peak inductor current is a hard no_substitute — it would saturate in this buck. The tool must resolve the requirement from the circuit, not defer as 'unverified'.
